purpose: Serve every income level while preserving one premium Brian & Co experience.
core_rule: The brand remains premium. Recommendations adapt to the individual.
recommendation_rules: Recommend products appropriate to goals and budget.
Offer financing where lawful and appropriate.
Offer digital products at multiple entry points.
Allow customers to grow into higher tiers naturally.
tone: trusted friend, knowledgeable, dependable, respectful of boundaries, refined and never gimmicky
